task_description: Add intelligent activity scheduling based on resident mobility status (bed-bound, wheelchair, walking aid, independent) and world-class wellbeing features including mood tracking, life story profiles, social isolation alerts, and environment preferences to improve residents' quality of life.

verification.summary: Both frontend and backend build successfully (exit code 0). All TypeScript errors are pre-existing in unmodified files (Emar.tsx, CareNotes.tsx, Incidents.tsx, Training.tsx, photos.controller.ts, auth.controller.ts, upload.ts).
